on

The semi-final fixtures, date and time for the Paris 2024 Olympic Men’s football event have been confirmed.

This follows the conclusion of Friday’s quarter-final stage matches.

Recall that Egypt defeated Paraguay 5-4 on penalties after the match ended 1-1, while France won 1-0 against Argentina.

Spain won 3-0 against Japan and Morocco defeated USA 4-0.

Olympics Men’s semi-final fixtures:

Morocco vs Spain (Monday – 5pm)

France vs Egypt (Monday – 8pm).

Transfer: Maresca breaks silence after banning Chelsea player from dressing room

EPL: Ten Hag reveals Man Utd star will return to squad in two months
